disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A localised tingling and burning sensation on the lip preceded the eruption by about a day, before any blisters appeared
trigger_question_examples: Did you feel anything on the lip before the blisters came up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yesterday my lip started tingling and burning in one spot, and then today the blisters came up there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Grouped small tense blisters on a red base located precisely on the outer border (vermilion) of the lower lip, some now ruptured and weeping
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're a tight little cluster of blisters right on the edge of my lower lip, on a red patch, and a few have burst and are weeping.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent similar lip episodes, typically triggered by stress or being run down
trigger_question_examples: Does anything seem to bring them on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I get cold sores on my lip now and then, usually when I'm stressed or run down — but this one is worse than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No ulcers inside the mouth, no target-shaped spots elsewhere on the body, and no new medication started recently
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any sores inside your mouth or a rash anywhere else?
Have you started any new medicines recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing inside my mouth, no spots or rash anywhere else on my body, and I haven't started any new medicines.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The skin surrounding the cluster is not spreading, diffusely hot, or grossly swollen; no thick honey-coloured crusting; no fever
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading out across your face, or is the area hot and swollen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, and the redness is just around the blisters — it's not spreading across my face and my face doesn't feel hot or puffy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No eye redness, eye pain, watering, or light sensitivity at present
trigger_question_examples: Are your eyes red, painful, watery or sensitive to light?
Have you touched your lip and then your eye?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My eyes are fine — no redness, no pain, no watering and they're not sensitive to light.
